div1.entryFree:
Contention, 1) debate, dispute: it was in a place where I could not breed no c. with him, H5 V, 1, 11. no quarrel, but a slight c. H6C I, 2, 6. 'twas a c. in public, Cymb. I, 4, 58.
2) combat, fight: in the very heat and pride of their c. H4A I, 1, 60. Troil. IV, 1, 16. IV, 5, 205. Oth. II, 1, 92.
3) discord: c., like a horse full of high feeding, madly hath broke loose, H4B I, 1, 9. let this world no longer be a stage to feed c. in a lingering act, H4B I, 1, 9
